incidents.name: Fable 5 requiring usage credits on Max plans

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
Some Claude Code Max plan users were incorrectly prompted to use usage credits to access Fable 5, which is included in their plan. If you were affected, please restart Claude Code.
This incident has been resolved.
A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.
The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.
We are currently investigating this issue.
This issue has been resolved, and Claude Fable 5 is available once again without usage credits, as expected.

We have applied a fix to resolve the erroneous requirement for usage credits on Fable 5, and are monitoring to ensure no further issues. You may need to relaunch Claude.ai or Claude Code to restore access as expected.
